AdditionalAttributes.description:
Developed by Danone, Activia combines over 30 years of scientific research with innovation to deliver a yoghurt that supports digestive health every day. Only Activia contains exclusive probiotics Bifidus ActiRegularis, proven to survive the journey through the gastro intestinal tract and reach the gut microbiome alive, to provide gut health benefits.

Enjoy a deliciously creamy mixed berries yoghurt with no added sugar, no artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Probiotics 100X stronger

  • No added sugar

  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Gelatine free

  • Good source of calcium

 

*Activia helps improve digestive comfort when 250g is consumed daily as part of a healthy lifestyle and balanced diet.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 5.6bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.6bn after stomach acid based on 160 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size), compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.?

Please note the second disclaimer vary depending on the service size. Please see below:

Large Tub 900g disclaimer with CFU count: ^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 5.2bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.5bn after stomach acid based on 150 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size). Compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus culture found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
a2 Milk® Full Cream 2L is pure, naturally A1 protein free Australian milk from specially selected dairy cows.

a2 Milk® is no ordinary milk!

It is real milk that may be easier on digestion for some people*.

As the number 1 producer of A1 protein free milk in Australia, our purpose is to pioneer the future of dairy for good.


For more information on the a2 Milk® difference visit www.a2milk.com.au

*a2 Milk® comes from cows specially selected to naturally produce milk with only the A2-type beta-casein protein so may be easier on digestion than ordinary milk for some milk intolerant individuals when consumed as part of a healthy, varied diet.

All natural with no additives, this delicious and creamy fresh milk with less than 4g of fat per 100mL

Easier on digestion for some* *a2 Milk® comes from cows specially selected to naturally produce milk with only the A2-type beta-casein protein so may be easier on digestion than regular milk for some milk intolerant individuals when consumed as part of a healthy, varied diet.

Naturally all A2-type beta-casein protein type, and no A1 Some people may be sensitive to a protein called A1 beta-casein commonly found in milk.

The perfect milk for all occasions! Use a2 Milk® in tea and coffee, baking, cooking, with cereal, with cookies, or simply enjoy on its own.

a2 Milk® has been proudly partnering with Landcare Australia since 2017 to support our farmers with initiatives to protect, enhance and restore the natural environment

Good source of calcium

Contains Protein
